metadata.youtube_title: 🤯 두바이 초콜릿에 숨겨진 충격적인 진실 3가지 l #쇼츠 #알쓸신잡
veo_prompt: Cinematic 9:16 vertical split-screen showing a question mark over a glowing Dubai chocolate bar.
Cinematic 9:16 vertical shot of raw golden knafeh pastry noodles resting on a rustic wooden board.
Cinematic 9:16 vertical macro shot of knafeh noodles being fried in a pan with golden butter.
Cinematic 9:16 vertical shot of the original FIX Dessert Chocolatier chocolate bar packaging from Dubai.
Cinematic 9:16 vertical shot showing the thick colorful paint splatters on the original FIX chocolate bar.
Cinematic 9:16 vertical shot of a modern Korean convenience store dessert shelf filled with various Dubai chocolate copycats.
Cinematic 9:16 vertical macro shot comparing two chocolate bars side by side, one messy, one perfectly smooth.
Cinematic 9:16 vertical shot of a big 'SUBSCRIBE' button floating over a pile of roasted pistachios.

trend_info.trend_reason: 데이터 분석가 Stats의 긴급 추천 아이템

metadata.youtube_title: 🥛 백종원이 '천상의 맛'이라 극찬한 이유... 진짜 카이막 먹방 (충격 주의) l #카이막 #리뷰
metadata.veo_prompt: Cinematic 9:16 vertical shot of thick, white, clotted cream (kaimak) on a rustic dark wooden board, a honey dipper drizzling golden honey over it. Moody studio lighting.

metadata.youtube_title: 🧑‍🍳 단돈 1만원으로 두바이 초콜릿 100% 똑같이 만드는 레시피 폭로
veo_prompt: Cinematic 9:16 vertical shot of a kitchen table with basic ingredients: chocolate bars, pistachio spread, butter, and raw knafeh noodles.
Cinematic 9:16 vertical shot of melting dark chocolate chips in a glass bowl over a pot of hot water.
Cinematic 9:16 vertical shot of golden butter sizzling in a hot frying pan.
Cinematic 9:16 vertical shot of raw knafeh noodles being fried to a crispy golden brown in the butter.
Cinematic 9:16 vertical shot of bright green pistachio spread being poured into a bowl of the crispy knafeh.
Cinematic 9:16 vertical shot of pouring melted chocolate into a silicone mold.
Cinematic 9:16 vertical macro shot of stuffing the green pistachio knafeh mixture into the chocolate mold.
Cinematic 9:16 vertical shot of the final perfect homemade Dubai chocolate being broken in half.

metadata.youtube_title: 🍩 드디어 선넘은 두바이 초콜릿... 수제 공방 두바이 도넛 리얼 매크로 리뷰
veo_prompt: Cinematic 9:16 vertical shot of the exterior of a trendy artisan bakery cafe with people lining up.
Cinematic 9:16 vertical shot of a display case filled with giant plump donuts topped with crushed pistachios.
Cinematic 9:16 vertical shot of picking up a heavy, cream-filled donut with a napkin.
Cinematic 9:16 vertical macro shot of tearing the soft donut bread open with hands.
Cinematic 9:16 vertical extreme close up of a bright green pistachio and knafeh waterfall erupting from the donut.
Cinematic 9:16 vertical shot showing the contrasting texture of the soft fluffy donut dough and the crispy green filling.
Cinematic 9:16 vertical shot of a person taking a massive bite of the donut with cream getting on their lips.
Cinematic 9:16 vertical shot of an empty plate with a few pistachio crumbs and a 'Must Try' sticker.
